content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于3月9日20:10(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年3月9日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【问题修复】
一、战斗
● 修复了唤醒体「莫斯」的狂气超过100但不满足狂气爆发释放条件时，点击唤醒体头像会错误地弹出狂气爆发释放确认窗口的问题。
● 修复了血肉界域中，「猩红熔炉」积攒的回复量达到上限时，仍然错误地显示未满的问题。
● 修复了「疾驰的欢愉专列」中，造物和刻印不受「小 N 的相机」黄金调和效果加成的问题。

二、相位对弈
● 修复了「相位对弈」的「预组编队」中快速编队时，唤醒体「莫丝」的头像错误地显示为「图鲁」头像的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」结算的「数据统计」中，唤醒体「莫丝」的头像错误地显示为「图鲁」头像的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「莫丝」的狂气爆发会错误地为双方「莫丝」的狂气爆发升级的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「莫丝」的「潆回波动」被其他唤醒体获取时，生成的「波动弹」所属唤醒体错误为「莫丝」的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」的「唤醒体试训」中，敌方黑猫会连续释放狂气爆发的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中表情「图鲁·凌驾」描述错误的问题。

三、一般
● 修复了守密人头像「莫丝」错误地显示为「塔薇」头像的问题。
● 修复了在特别唤醒「晦夜引灯」中选择「弥利亚姆」等部分唤醒体时，可能会导致「晦夜引灯」唤醒和「唤醒体」界面列表中的相应唤醒体立绘丢失的问题。
● 修复了「典藏馆」的「造物」中缺少造物「寂静序曲」的问题。
● 修复了「通讯器」在滑动对话内容时，可能出现文本超出对话框的问题。

四、本地化
● 修复了在部分语言设置下，「唤醒体」的「技能升级」界面中部分唤醒体技能的「属性」提升显示有误的问题。
● 修复了在部分语言设置下，部分剧情、表情说明等存在文本错乱的问题。
● 修复了在英语语言设置下，唤醒体「皮克曼」的技能「绘影摹形」、唤醒体「希莱斯特」的灵知觉醒「庇佑之力」翻译错误的问题。
● 修复了在英语语言设置下，命轮「坠入虚无的人偶」和造物「催眠灵摆」的「空虚」状态翻译错误的问题。

V2.4.3.1 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on March 9 at 20:10(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
  
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on March 9, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
  
[Update Content]
1. Battle
● Fixed an issue where clicking the Awakener portrait of "Moss" would incorrectly trigger the Exalt release confirmation window when the Awakener's Aliemus exceeded 100 but did not meet the conditions required to unleash Exalt.
● Fixed an issue in the Caro Realm where the "Crimson Furnace" accumulation bar incorrectly displayed as not full even when the Healing had reached its cap.
● Fixed an issue in "Rapture Express!" where Relics and Orisons were not receiving the bonus from the Gold Harmony effect of "Small N's Camera."

2. Traphase
● Fixed an issue in the "All Pick Lineup" of "Traphase" where the avatar of Awakener "Vortice" was incorrectly displayed as the avatar of "Tulu" during quick lineup.
● Fixed an issue where Awakener "Vortice's" portrait was incorrectly displayed as "Tulu's" portrait in the "Data Statistics" of "Traphase" settlement.
● Fixed an issue in "Traphase" where Awakener "Vortice"'s Exalt would incorrectly upgrade both players' "Vortice"'s Exalt.
● Fixed an issue where, when the "Rippling Wave" of Awakener "Vortice" in "Traphase" was acquired by another Awakener, the "Tidal Shell" generated would incorrectly belong to "Vortice".
● Fixed an issue in the "Awakener Trial" of "Traphase" where the enemy Black Cat would continuously unleash Exalt.
● Fixed an issue where the Emote "Tulu-Overwhelming" in "Traphase" had an incorrect description.

3. Normal
● Fixed an issue where the Keeper's avatar "Vortice" was incorrectly displayed as "Tawil's" avatar.
● Fixed an issue where selecting "Miryam" and certain other Awakeners in the Special Awaken "Moonless Guide" could cause the corresponding Awakener illustrations to disappear from the "Moonless Guide" Awaken and "Awakener" interface lists.
● Fixed an issue where the Relic "Silent Prelude" was missing from the "Relics" section of the "Premium Gallery."
● Fixed an issue where text could overflow outside the dialogue box when scrolling through conversations in the "Communicator."

4. Localization
● Fixed an issue where, under certain language settings, the "Attribute" improvement display for some Awakener Skills in the "Skill Upgrade" interface of the "Awakener" was incorrect.
● Fixed an issue where text was displayed incorrectly in certain Story descriptions, Emote descriptions, and other areas under some language settings.
● Fixed an issue where, under English language settings, the translation was incorrect for Awakener "Pickman"'s skill "Lifelike Rendition" and Awakener "Celeste"'s Gnosis Rouse "Power of Blessing".
● Fixed an issue where the "Void" State translation was incorrect for the Wheel of Destiny "Manikin of Oblivion" and the Relic "Hypnotic Pendulum" under English language settings.
什麼時候修復你那個當你們一邊聊天，一邊離開此地時

● 修复了在部分语言设置下，部分剧情、表情说明等存在文本错乱的问题。

那段是繁中翻譯bug
喔喔喔我沒看到這個，謝謝你，我還想說找不到關於文本修改相關的公告

<@633215996508766229> 莫丝这个角色现在已经是你游问题的集大成者了：立绘敷衍不细化修改；大招质感塑料；角色机制缝合且处处受限、导致手感一坨；
曾经剧情、美术和玩法是你游的三大王牌，后来为了赚日服的钱，分掉国际服产能，美术和文案质量直线下滑，现在连最后一张玩法设计的底牌也要丢掉吗？

天赋中的神国真的是为了限制强度？是否设计的有点保守了？
自身没有生触腕的手段，大招驱散燃烧意义在哪里？还有她的技能卡真的好卡手

那我怎么还不如去玩淡墨
还有就是莫丝好色，配音好可爱呀🥰
